title: 4D YM Construction Gap — Exact Failure Point by EML Depth

analysis.object: T800: 4D YM Construction Gap — Exact Failure Point by EML Depth depth analysis

uv_divergence_2d.description: 2D QFT: UV divergences logarithmic -- renormalization EML-2 (log subtraction)

uv_divergence_3d.description: 3D QFT: UV divergences power-law -- partially controlled

uv_divergence_4d.description: 4D QFT: UV divergences quartic -- renormalization requires EML-inf counterterms
uv_divergence_4d.reason: Quartic divergence: EML-1 modes * EML-3 oscillation = EML-inf

mode_count_4d.description: Number of UV modes in 4D: grows as Lambda^4 -- EML-1 (exponential in ln Lambda)

renorm_group_4d.description: Renormalization group flow in 4D: beta function has double zero at g=0
renorm_group_4d.reason: Double zero = EML-3 oscillatory fixed point

failure_point.description: 4D failure: EML-1 modes * EML-3 flow = EML-inf product at UV cutoff removal
failure_point.reason: The crossing: EML-1 times EML-3 = EML-inf under continuum limit

t800_anatomy.description: T800: The 4D gap is the product EML-1 x EML-3 = EML-inf when Lambda->inf. 2D and 3D stay EML-finite because fewer modes.
t800_anatomy.reason: Exact failure point identified: mode-flow product crosses EML-inf

analysis.theorem: T800: 4D YM Construction Gap — Exact Failure Point by EML Depth (S1079).

key_theorem: T800: 4D YM Construction Gap — Exact Failure Point by EML Depth (S1079).
